creator: ekathird@mail.com
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #7)


I too am using webcamd and see these messages from chromium filling my log:

...
+WARNING pid 73668 (chrome): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc034564b
+WARNING pid 73668 (chrome): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc034564b
+WARNING pid 73668 (chrome): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc034564b
+WARNING pid 73668 (chrome): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc02c564a
+WARNING pid 73668 (chrome): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0405602
...

[FreeBSD ealexander@ealex ~]$ freebsd-version -kru 
11.3-RELEASE-p3
11.3-RELEASE-p3
11.3-RELEASE-p3

Yes, I will be upgrading to 11.4-RELEASE soon. Is this fixed there? Thanks!

Gene
